name: Complica
author: Reiner Knizia (1991)
description: Reiner Knizia's Connect-4 variant on a 4-wide, 7-tall grid. Drop a disc into a column: a non-full column stacks it on top, but a FULL column is pushed down one row (the bottom disc falls off) and your disc enters at the top. First to line up four of their own discs — horizontal, vertical, or diagonal — wins. If a single move gives BOTH players a four-in-a-row, no one wins and play continues.
